side_effects.description: Insomnia is a side effect of Retatrutide; body and brain won't relax; increased metabolic rate contributes to poor sleep

protocol_notes: Reports personal experience with daily injections feeling better than bolus injections once or twice weekly. Has had no luck resolving insomnia despite adjusting injection frequency. Uses protein shake recipe with protein powder, almond/coconut milk, banana, berries, MCT oil, and rice powder (500-750 calories per shake).
